data.body: ddbe held-out validation (Phase 4e): implementer (held-out subagent) returned all-green (happy 3/3, lint+typecheck clean, 1468 touched-area tests). Restored held-out oracle + ran full 14: 12 pass, 2 FAIL -> both confirmed TEST BUGS not impl gaps (list_tickets keys by ticket_id not id; over-broad subprocess monkeypatch broke create). Fixed tests only (impl confirmed correct: identity excluded from list/ready/next_batch, resolver degrades to None). Mutation-tested exemption invariant (removed identity from _NON_GRAPH_ARTIFACT_TYPES -> test RED -> teeth confirmed; note: git checkout restore clobbered uncommitted impl edit, re-applied by hand). All 14 GREEN. Pre-flight: make lint + typecheck GREEN (after ruff format on test file). Full make test running. Files: schema+gen types, composer, reducer/_processors+_api, reconciler config, 4 gate/exempt sites, plan_review orchestrator+workflow_ops, NEW _commands/identity.py, _lib_writes, __init__, _mcp_writes, _cli. Design note: identity CLI routed as main() intercept (not leaf-write dispatcher) to avoid golden/coverage test edits.
